===================
===================
=== 2003-05-11 - Solomons, Maryland.txt
===================
===================
===================
Solomons, Maryland
Washington Gas Pavilion
Calvert Marine Museum

11 May 2003
 

01 - Maggie's Farm
02 - Tell Me That It Isn't True
03 - Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum
04 - Lay Lady Lay
05 - Things Have Changed
06 - The Wicked Messenger
07 - Just Like A Woman
08 - Highway 61 Revisited
09 - High Water (for Charlie Patton)
10 - Watching The River Flow
11 - Saving Grace
12 - Honest With Me
13 - Bye And Bye
14 - Summer Days
 
        (encore)
 
15 - Like A Rolling Stone
16 - All Along The Watchtower

Concert # 1519 of The Never-Ending Tour. 
Concert # 18 of the 2003 US Spring Tour. 2003 concert # 29. 
Concert # 18 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: 
        Bob Dylan (vocal & piano), 
        Freddie Koella (guitar), 
        Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), 
        Tony Garnier (bass), 
        George Receli (drums & percussion).

2, 4, 7 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
2, 6, 10 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
10, 12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).

6 new songs (37%) compared to previous concert. No new songs for this tour.


47min+52min ; 2CDR ; Rating: A-
 
5/11/03 Solomons, Maryland, Calvert Marine Museum, Washington Gas Pavilion 

from Jeff F: 
"This is an outdoor recording of a very good concert, Bob and his Band on the dock 
playing great Rock and Roll underneath the light of the silvery moon. 
Expect to hear some wind noises on this recording, this was recorded outdoors with 
the wind blowing in off the Chesapeake Bay by our man wearing a hat. 
This is the next best thing to 'being there', better than that. Thank you, Jeff F."
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
version 'b', has occasional wind noise, upfront sounding; (cedar 4); excellent sound; 
has some brickwalling on loud parts like t15 4:50, t16 2:33; 
in comparison version "a" sounds a little muffled and 'theodore sounds more tinny making 
this one warmer sounding;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
drop/cut between cdrs
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CD1
1 intro, + Maggie's Farm (Bob on piano), 2 Tell Me That It Isn't True (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel), 3 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 4 Lay, Lady, Lay (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel), 5 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 6 The Wicked Messenger (Bob on electric guitar and harp), 7 Just Like A Woman (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel), 8 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 

CD2
1 High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano), 2 Watching The River Flow (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on slide guitar), 3 Saving Grace (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel), 4 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 5 Bye And Bye (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 6 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 7 (encore), Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 8 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano) 
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


*** This is the same recording as LB-1159 ***
Rating: A-
Frequency analysis: way above 20kHz

Taper: unidentified
Lineage: no info
